name: world-cup-2026-predictor
description: Build, launch, score, validate, and maintain an interactive 48-team World Cup 2026 predictor.

interface.shortDescription: Build, score, and track a World Cup bracket.
interface.longDescription: Launch the interactive 48-team predictor, generate brackets, query ESPN-backed latest/today/upcoming results, score predictions, and validate tournament data.
defaultPrompt: Launch the predictor and guide me through a complete bracket.
Generate a full tournament prediction and summarize the champion path.
Check the latest completed World Cup matches from ESPN.
Show today's completed matches and the next upcoming fixtures from ESPN.
Check whether ESPN team-name mapping has drifted.
Check whether the installed skill is up to date.
Explain or score my bracket against real results.
Review, repair, and validate the predictor data and bundled app.
